scripts.typecheck:v2: npm run -w @finance-taxation/web typecheck && npm run -w @finance-taxation/api typecheck
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.v4:test:db:start: docker compose -p finance-taxation-v4-test -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d db
scripts.v4:test:app:start: docker compose -p finance-taxation-v4-test -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build api web
scripts.v4:test:stack:start: npm run v4:test:db:start && npm run v4:test:app:start
scripts.v4:test:setup: npm run v4:test:db:start && npm run v4:test:db:reset && npm run v4:test:seed && npm run v4:test:app:start
scripts.verify:v4: npm run typecheck:v2 && npm run typecheck:v4:tools && npm run test:unit && npm run test:v4:tools && npm run check:progress
scripts.verify: npm run check:prototype && npm run check:backend-js && npm run check:data && npm run check:progress
